description_long: This is a large, multi-winged residential house with a complex, sprawling footprint and a prominent hip roof system. The structure features multiple roof sections at varying heights, with the main central block flanked by two substantial side wings. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted siding, and the roof is a dark, shingled material. Numerous large windows are arranged in regular rows along the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes a covered entryway and several porch-like extensions, suggesting multiple access points and outdoor living spaces. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern suburban estate or luxury ranch-style home.
description: A large, multi-winged house with a dark hip roof, light exterior walls, and numerous large windows arranged in regular rows. The structure features a sprawling layout with covered entryways and porch extensions.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the main entryway, central block, and both side wings with prominent hip roofs and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the left wing and the connection between the main block and the side structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades, regular window rows, and the full width of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the right wing and the overall length of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered main entryway with steps, wide porch, and supporting columns
